div.class: o_editor_banner user-select-none lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-info pb-0 pt-3 o-contenteditable-false

div.p: To illustrate how this setup works, this database is configured for a tennis and padel club appropriately named "The Club." Despite being a small business, they juggle a wide variety of daily operations, including:

li.p: Court Rentals: Managing bookings and scheduling for players.
Gear & Equipment: Handling basic sports gear and inventory.
Cafeteria: Running their on-site food and beverage services.

div.p: To keep all these moving parts organized, The Club manages its entire business seamlessly using Odoo. Below are the detailed workflows they rely on every day.

💡 Quick Reminder: Odoo is fully customizable. You can easily change the configuration settings and add a wide variety of free apps to your database to tailor it perfectly to your specific business needs.

template.p: Easily manage club memberships that grant exclusive perks, such as year-round free court access and automated discounts at the bar.

li.p: Subscription-Driven Tiers: Define your membership packages as products in the Subscription App. When a customer buys one, Odoo automatically assigns a specific partner level directly to their customer profile.
Smart Pricelists: Link these membership levels to custom pricelists. The system will automatically apply preferential rates, bar discounts, or free bookings whenever the member makes a purchase.

template.p: This architecture allows you to fully customize your club's offerings. You can easily scale your business by creating multiple membership tiers (e.g., Gold, Silver, Junior) with distinct pricing rules and unique perks.
The Club sells its sports gear seamlessly across two primary sales channels, ensuring a smooth shopping experience whether players are at home or at the courts.
Perfect for members browsing and buying online.

li.p: Flexible Fulfillment: Customers can choose between convenient paid home delivery or free in-club pickup.
Smart Upselling: The system automatically maximizes revenue. For example, when a customer purchases a racket, the eShop strategically suggests relevant add-ons like towels or balls before checkout.
Instant Checkout: If a player needs gear right before a match or wants to buy items directly at the club, staff can process the transaction instantly using the dedicated Shop POS system.

template.p: Keep your food and beverage service running efficiently by launching a second, dedicated Point of Sale (POS) session specifically for the bar.

li.p: Streamlined Workflows: Easily organize your menu into clear product categories to create an intuitive, fast-paced checkout screen for your bar staff.
Unified Management: Oversee bar-specific inventory, track customer tabs, and seamlessly accept every payment method your venue offers from one screen.

div.class: o_editor_banner user-select-none o-contenteditable-false lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-success pb-0 pt-3

li.p: Instant Member Scanning: Link unique barcodes to your members' profiles. Staff can simply scan a physical or digital membership card at the bar to instantly apply their preferential discounts or tab the drinks to their account.

Full Restaurant Capabilities: Do you have a kitchen or seated dining area? Map out a visual table layout right in the system and integrate a digital Kitchen Display System (KDS) to seamlessly coordinate orders between the floor and the kitchen.

ul.li: Streamlined Team Scheduling: Keep your operations running like clockwork by managing all bartender and floor staff shifts directly within the integrated Planning app.

template.p: The Club utilizes two distinct appointment types to accommodate both private sessions and social play:

li.p: Duration: 60-minute playing sessions.
Frequency: Slots start every 30 minutes to maximize court turnover and availability.
Availability: Exclusive to Friday evenings.
Purpose: Designed for social play, allowing individual players to sign up and join open, existing games.

Shareable Court Resources: Because the courts are configured as shareable resources, multiple players can register for the same court simultaneously. The system will continue to accept registrations for a slot as long as there are open spots available on that court.
Internal Counter Bookings: For walk-ins or phone reservations, counter employees can seamlessly book courts on behalf of members by navigating to the Appointments > Resource Schedule menu.

template.p: Build an online presence that adapts perfectly to your clients' needs. Odoo gives you the flexibility to easily integrate internal policies, customize forms, showcase your latest products, manage the booking spaces and so much more—no coding required.
Your website doesn't just sit there—it actively works to grow your business.

li.p: Automated Lead Generation: Every submission on your "Contact Us" page instantly creates a brand-new opportunity in your CRM App.

From the CRM app: Track client interactions in real time and use the Sales App to quickly shoot over tailored quotations for B2B leads or custom customer requests, or use the Subscription App for new members.

template.h1: Do you want to go further?
template.p: Once your core operations are running smoothly, consider expanding your toolset:

li.p: Accounting: Automatically log payments, close sessions, and generate tax reports.

ul.li: Payroll: Use this feature to handle employee salaries and manage holiday requests.
Explore marketing possibilities with Email Marketing, SMS Marketing, Social Marketing and Marketing Automation apps
Manage all your events from the Events module

div.class: o_editor_banner user-select-none o-contenteditable-false lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-info pb-0 pt-3

div.p: Would you like to discuss your Odoo setup with us or go even further?
